description: Security analysis detection rules for Scrutin AI code review

A01_BrokenAccessControl.name: Broken Access Control
A01_BrokenAccessControl.description: Restrictions on what authenticated users are allowed to do are often not properly enforced

security.title: SQL injection
security.description: SQL queries built with string concatenation enable injection

security.title: Command injection
security.description: User input in Process.Start enables command injection

security.title: Unsafe deserialization
security.description: BinaryFormatter enables remote code execution

security.title: SSRF vulnerability
security.description: User input in HTTP requests enables SSRF

security.title: Path traversal
security.description: File paths with user input enable traversal

security.title: Hardcoded credentials
security.description: Credentials should not be hardcoded

security.title: Disabled certificate validation
security.description: SSL certificate validation must not be disabled

security.title: ReDoS vulnerability
security.description: Regex with nested quantifiers enables denial of service

bugs.title: Async void method
bugs.description: Async void methods cannot be awaited and swallow exceptions

bugs.title: Blocking async call
bugs.description: .Result/.Wait() in async context causes deadlocks

bugs.title: Float equality
bugs.description: Floating point equality comparison is unreliable

bugs.title: throw ex loses stack trace
bugs.description: Use throw; instead of throw ex; to preserve stack trace

bugs.title: Collection modified during iteration
bugs.description: Modifying collection during foreach causes InvalidOperationException

codeSmells.title: Method too long
codeSmells.description: Methods over 50 lines should be refactored

codeSmells.title: Too many parameters
codeSmells.description: Methods with >5 parameters should use parameter objects

codeSmells.title: Business logic in controller
codeSmells.description: Controllers should delegate to service layer

security.name: Dynamic code execution with user input
SSRF via http.Get with user URL

bugs.name: String to int conversion error ignored

security.name: WebView XSS via loadUrl with user input
Universal access from file URL enabled
Integer overflow leading to buffer overflow
Sensitive data in memory without cleanup

bugs.name: Nullable type used where non-null expected
Flow state update from wrong thread
Index out of bounds in list
Activity leak via anonymous inner class

codeSmells.name: List should be Set for uniqueness
Freeze mutable state in data class
Use safe call instead of if-null
Use elvis operator instead of throw
Use let for null check block
Use run instead of let with this
Redundant null check after smart cast
Use async with awaitAll for parallel
Default parameter value could be used
List operation could be single call
Any instead of find for existence
Use Room instead of raw SQLite
Use Coil or Glide for images
Use Koin instead of manual DI
Type parameter naming T, E, K, V

security.title: S3 bucket without encryption
security.description: S3 buckets should have server-side encryption enabled

security.title: Security group open to internet on SSH
security.description: Security groups should not allow SSH from 0.0.0.0/0

security.title: Hardcoded AWS credentials
security.description: AWS access keys should never be hardcoded in Terraform files

security.title: Publicly accessible database
security.description: Database instances should not be publicly accessible

security.title: IAM policy with wildcard permissions
security.description: IAM policies should follow least privilege principle

security.title: CloudTrail not enabled
security.description: CloudTrail should be enabled for audit logging

security.title: S3 bucket with public ACL
security.description: S3 buckets should not have public ACLs

security.title: EKS public endpoint
security.description: EKS cluster endpoints should not be publicly accessible

security.title: IAM user without MFA
security.description: IAM users should have MFA enabled

security.title: RDS without SSL enforcement
security.description: RDS should enforce SSL/TLS connections

security.title: ALB listener without HTTPS
security.description: ALB listeners should use HTTPS protocol

security.title: Elasticsearch publicly accessible
security.description: Elasticsearch domains should not be publicly accessible

iac.title: Missing provider version constraint
iac.description: Providers should have version constraints to prevent breaking changes

iac.title: Module without version pin
iac.description: Module sources should include version pins for reproducibility

iac.title: Missing depends_on
iac.description: Use depends_on when Terraform cannot infer dependencies

iac.title: Missing lifecycle prevent_destroy
iac.description: Stateful resources should use prevent_destroy lifecycle rule

iac.title: Backend without state locking
iac.description: Remote backends should have state locking enabled

iac.title: Missing terraform block
iac.description: Configuration should include terraform block with required_version

iac.title: Provisioner usage
iac.description: Provisioners are a last resort; prefer native resources

iac.title: Sensitive variable not marked
iac.description: Variables containing secrets should be marked as sensitive

bugs.title: Deprecated interpolation syntax
bugs.description: Use native expressions instead of deprecated interpolation

bugs.title: Invalid CIDR block format
bugs.description: CIDR blocks must be valid IP ranges

bugs.title: Subnet CIDR outside VPC range
bugs.description: Subnet CIDR must be within VPC CIDR range

bugs.title: Using deprecated resource type
bugs.description: Replace deprecated resource types with successors

bugs.title: Duplicate resource name
bugs.description: Resource names must be unique within a module

codeSmells.title: Hardcoded AMI ID
codeSmells.description: AMI IDs should be variables or data source lookups

codeSmells.title: Missing tags on resource
codeSmells.description: All taggable resources should include standard tags

codeSmells.title: Module too large
codeSmells.description: Modules with too many resources should be split

codeSmells.title: Unnecessary interpolation
codeSmells.description: Avoid wrapping single references in interpolation

security.name: Using ADD instead of COPY for archives

bugs.name: ARG before FROM not available after

codeSmells.name: COPY instead of ADD for URL

security.name: Hardcoded password in CI/CD variable
security.description: Passwords should never be hardcoded in pipeline files
security.remediation: Use secrets management or CI/CD variables with masking

security.name: Hardcoded API key in pipeline
security.description: API keys should be stored securely
security.remediation: Use GitHub Secrets, GitLab CI/CD Variables, or similar

security.name: Hardcoded SSH private key
security.description: SSH private keys in pipeline files are exposed
security.remediation: Store SSH keys in secrets management

security.name: Sudo without password in container
security.description: Sudo commands without password prompts allow privilege escalation
security.remediation: Configure sudo with specific command restrictions

security.name: curl piped to bash execution
security.description: Piping curl output directly to shell is dangerous

security.name: wget piped to shell execution
security.description: Piping wget output to shell allows code injection

security.name: Untrusted third-party action
security.description: Third-party actions may contain malicious code
security.remediation: Pin to specific SHA and audit action source

security.name: Unpinned action reference
security.description: Floating tags allow supply chain attacks
security.remediation: Pin to specific commit SHA (40 chars)

security.name: Self-hosted runner without isolation
security.description: Self-hosted runners need proper isolation
security.remediation: Use ephemeral runners with network isolation

security.name: Insecure environment variable exposure
security.description: Secrets may be exposed in environment variables
security.remediation: Ensure secrets are masked in logs

security.name: Sensitive data in environment variables
security.description: Sensitive data in env vars may leak

security.name: Docker socket mounted in container
security.description: Docker socket mount allows container escape
security.remediation: Use Docker-in-Docker or remote API with TLS

security.name: Privileged container execution
security.description: Privileged containers have full host access

security.name: Host network namespace shared
security.description: Host network sharing reduces isolation
security.remediation: Use bridge networks or network policies

security.name: Secrets in build arguments
security.description: Docker build args can be exposed in image history
security.remediation: Use BuildKit secrets or multi-stage builds

security.name: Insecure registry configuration
security.description: Insecure registry connections allow MITM attacks

security.name: eval with user input
security.description: eval allows arbitrary code execution

pipeline.name: No retry policy on flaky steps

bugs.name: Missing artifact dependency
bugs.description: Job depends on another but artifacts not configured
bugs.remediation: Explicitly configure artifact passing

bugs.name: Wrong branch filter configuration
bugs.description: Branch filters may not match intended branches
bugs.remediation: Review and correct branch filter patterns

bugs.name: Circular job dependency detected
bugs.description: Jobs have circular dependencies causing deadlock
bugs.remediation: Remove circular references in job dependencies

bugs.name: YAML syntax error
bugs.description: Invalid YAML syntax prevents pipeline execution
bugs.remediation: Fix YAML indentation and structure

bugs.name: Missing required variable
bugs.description: Required environment variable not defined
bugs.remediation: Define all required variables

bugs.name: Job dependency not defined
bugs.description: Referenced job dependency doesn't exist
bugs.remediation: Define the missing job or fix reference

bugs.name: Stage not defined
bugs.description: Referenced stage is not defined
bugs.remediation: Define the stage or remove reference

bugs.name: Duplicate job name
bugs.description: Multiple jobs with same name cause conflicts
bugs.remediation: Rename jobs to have unique names

bugs.name: Invalid runner tag
bugs.description: Runner tag doesn't match any available runner
bugs.remediation: Use valid runner tags

bugs.name: Needs dependency missing
bugs.description: Job needs dependency that doesn't exist
bugs.remediation: Fix or remove the dependency reference

bugs.name: Artifact path not found
bugs.description: Artifact path doesn't exist in workspace
bugs.remediation: Ensure path exists before artifact upload

bugs.name: Cache key invalid
bugs.description: Cache key format is invalid
bugs.remediation: Use valid cache key format

bugs.name: Docker image not found
bugs.description: Referenced Docker image doesn't exist
bugs.remediation: Use correct image name and tag

bugs.name: Service container failed
bugs.description: Service container failed to start
bugs.remediation: Check service configuration and health

bugs.name: Script exit code ignored
bugs.description: Command failure may be ignored
bugs.remediation: Use set -e or check exit codes

bugs.name: Pipeline trigger syntax error
bugs.description: Trigger configuration is invalid
bugs.remediation: Fix trigger syntax

bugs.name: Include file not found
bugs.description: Referenced include/template file missing
bugs.remediation: Ensure file exists at specified path

bugs.name: Extends template not found
bugs.description: Extended template doesn't exist
bugs.remediation: Fix template reference

bugs.name: Rule syntax invalid
bugs.description: Job rule syntax is invalid
bugs.remediation: Fix rule syntax

bugs.name: Workflow syntax error
bugs.description: Workflow file has syntax errors
bugs.remediation: Validate workflow syntax

codeSmells.name: No caching configured
codeSmells.description: Dependencies not cached causing slow builds

codeSmells.name: Missing timeout configuration
codeSmells.description: Jobs without timeout may hang indefinitely

codeSmells.name: Action pinned to tag instead of SHA
codeSmells.description: Tags can be moved, compromising security

codeSmells.name: Large artifact without retention
codeSmells.description: Large artifacts without retention consume storage

codeSmells.name: Redundant environment setup
codeSmells.remediation: Use reusable workflow or composite action

codeSmells.name: Unnecessary privilege escalation
codeSmells.remediation: Remove unnecessary sudo or privileged mode

codeSmells.name: Debug logging left enabled
codeSmells.description: Debug logging may expose sensitive info
